name: room in the castle
description: I'm in a room in the castle
hints: This room has a plaque, a chute, a crack, and a hole. Read the plaque for clues.
READ PLAQUE for instructions. The crack leads somewhere. The chute is too slippery.
WAVE BAG (Ju-Ju bag) here - the Medium mentioned it helps through a tight squeeze.
WAVE BAG at the crack to get through to the hidden voodoo room (N/room 23). READ PLAQUE for the chant words.

effects: Message: There's a CLAP OF THUNDER!

notes: Key puzzle room with a crack leading to the hidden voodoo room. WAVE the Ju-Ju BAG to pass through the crack (as Medium Maegen advised). The plaque contains chant words for the finale.
